title: But what exactly are world models?
summary: Julia Turc surveys what world models are by distinguishing two main schools of thought: generative and predictive approaches. She organizes applications into three categories: synthetic data generation, interactive environments, and autonomous agents, with examples from NVIDIA, Meta, Google, and Wayve.
